song.title: Jesus, Our Wonderful Shepherd
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .A E7 A Jesus, our wonderful Shepherd, .E7 A A7 Brought us right out of the fold, .D A F#m Into His pasture so plenteous, .B7 E7 Into His riches untold.
[C] .A Glorious church life, . E Feasting from such a rich store! .A D A Gbm Here where we’re dwelling in oneness .E7 A D A God commands life evermore.
[V2] In the divisions He sought us, Weary and famished for food. Into the good land He brought us. Oh, to our spirit how good!
[V3] Jesus Himself is our pasture. He is the food that we eat. We as His sheep are fed richly Each time, whenever we meet.
[V4] Dwell we here on a high mountain, Wet with the morning-fresh dew, Slaking our thirst at the fountain, Water so living and new.
[V5] Christ is our rest and enjoyment. Here we have nothing to fear. Here all the sheep dwell securely, Kept by His presence so dear.
